subject: Cannot login to dashboard
description: I've been trying to log in since this morning but keep getting a 403 Forbidden error. Already reset password twice but the issue persists.

subject: Payment failed on checkout
description: Every time I try to complete a purchase I get 'Payment declined' even though my card is valid and has funds. This is blocking our entire team.

subject: Export CSV not working
description: When I click the Export to CSV button on the reports page, nothing happens. No download, no error message. I need this data urgently for a presentation.

subject: API rate limit issues
description: Our integration keeps hitting rate limits even though we are well below the documented threshold of 1000 requests/hour. Getting 429 errors constantly.

subject: Account billing discrepancy
description: Our invoice for April shows charges for 50 seats but we only have 30 active users. Please review and issue a corrected invoice as soon as possible.

subject: Mobile app crashes on open
description: The iOS app crashes immediately after the splash screen on iPhone 14 Pro running iOS 17.4. This started after the latest update (v2.3.1). Reinstalled twice.

subject: Two-factor authentication not working
description: I enabled 2FA but I never receive the SMS code. I have tried with two different phone numbers. Without 2FA I cannot access my account at all.

subject: Dashboard loading very slowly
description: The main dashboard takes over 45 seconds to load. This only started 3 days ago. Our team is losing a lot of time waiting. Internet connection is fine on our end.

subject: Data export missing columns
description: When I export patient records the 'date_of_birth' and 'contact_number' columns are completely missing from the CSV file. This is a compliance issue for us.

subject: Webhook not triggering on order
description: Our webhook endpoint is configured correctly but it stopped receiving order events 2 days ago. All other webhook types still work fine. Checked firewall — all good.

subject: Cannot upload profile picture
description: Every time I try to upload a profile image I get 'File too large' error even for a 120KB JPEG. The docs say limit is 5MB so something is wrong on your end.

subject: Reports page showing wrong dates
description: All the date filters on the Reports page are off by exactly one day. For example filtering May 25 shows data for May 24. This affects all our operational decisions.
